title: Subscription still locked
content: I paid for the yearly plan but the workouts are still locked. Restore purchase does not help.

title: Free trial charged immediately
content: The app said free trial but charged me right away. I cannot find where to cancel.

title: Workout crashed
content: The workout video crashes after warm up, and my progress is lost every time.
author: Nora

title: 中文反馈：训练计划太难找
content: 更新后训练计划入口变得很难找，点了好几次才看到收藏的课程。

title: Mixed language login issue
content: 登录后一直转圈 loading，network is fine，但计划页面打不开。

title: Great guided workouts
content: I love the short workouts and the reminders. Subscription worked fine for me.

title: Nice app after update
content: The new plan layout is cleaner for me, and the videos load quickly.

title: Payment restored
content: Restore purchase worked instantly after reinstalling. Very useful workouts.

title: 希望增加低冲击训练
